message:
🌱 surrealdb: Feature:  Refresh Token? Or Refresh Session? (#1896)

* 🌱 Add surrealdb: Feature:  Refresh Token? Or Refresh Session? mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* 🌱 Add surrealdb: Feature:  Refresh Token? Or Refresh Session? mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix surrealdb refresh token mission type from troubleshoot to feature

This is a feature request, not a troubleshoot issue. Update type field,
issueTypes metadata, and tags to reflect the correct mission type.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

+        "description": "Review the relevant surrealdb configuration:\n### Is your feature request related to a problem?\n\nFor apps with sensitive data, I need the token to expire in 15mins and refresh the connection as the user works on it.\n\n### Describe the solution\n\nI guess there could be 2 possibilities:\n\n1."

+        "title": "Apply the fix for Feature:  Refresh Token? Or Refresh Session?",

We really appreciate you spending the time to work on SurrealDB. \ud83d\ude80 \ud83c\udf89 \n\n## What is the motivation?\n\nTo enable record users to receive both a short-lived stateless token (i.e. the current authentication token) as well as a longer-lived stateful token that can be used to obtain additional authentication tokens for a defined duration.
